# Cost of Concrete

> Directory of vetted concrete contractors across the U.S. — driveways, patios, foundations, stamped concrete, sidewalks, repairs. We track license status, insurance (Certificate of Insurance on file), BBB record, and customer reviews for every listed contractor. ~22,000 contractor profiles, organized by state and city.

## Browse by location

- [Find by state](https://costofconcrete.com/find): all 50 U.S. states
- State pages: `https://costofconcrete.com/{state-slug}` (e.g. `/north-carolina`)
- City listicle (top picks): `https://costofconcrete.com/{state-slug}/{city-slug}/best-concrete-contractors`
- City directory (all contractors): `https://costofconcrete.com/{state-slug}/{city-slug}/concrete-contractors`
- Contractor profile: `https://costofconcrete.com/{state-slug}/{city-slug}/concrete-contractors/{contractor-slug}`

## Verification tiers

- **Cost of Concrete Certified Partner** — full vetting + Certificate of Insurance on file naming Cost of Concrete as Additional Insured
- **Fully Verified** — license + insurance confirmed
- **Verified** — license confirmed
- **Listed** — public-record contractor, not yet verified

## Resources

- [Patio cost guide](https://costofconcrete.com/how-much-does-a-concrete-patio-cost)
- [Rebar guide](https://costofconcrete.com/do-i-need-rebar-in-my-concrete)
- [Concrete repair guide](https://costofconcrete.com/can-cracks-in-concrete-be-repaired)
- [Concrete maintenance guide](https://costofconcrete.com/what-maintenance-does-residential-concrete-require)
